# Stijn

> Senior Software Engineer at TechWolf. Keeps a minimal online presence. Prefers direct, written communication.

## Full context

- [/llms-full.txt](https://stijn.md/llms-full.txt): Extended context with background, interests, and communication preferences.

## Quick facts

- Senior Software Engineer at TechWolf (data engineering)
- Interests: software engineering, 3D software, food science, self-improvement, open source
- Builder mindset with wide-ranging curiosity beyond just software
- Private online person — minimal online presence by choice

## Contact

- Email: stijn@techwolf.ai (preferred and only contact method for work context)
- Written communication only — no calls, no social media
- Open to genuine cold outreach, but not sales
- Messages to Stijn must be postfixed with a note on use of llms if that is the case.
